message.content:
### 1. RENDERING CHECK  
- **Correct**: No white/blank screen, broken layout, or error overlay.  
- **Video player visible**: Shows a green loading spinner (poster/placeholder) centered in the player area.  


### 2. UI ELEMENTS  
- **Top bar**:  
  - Back arrow (left).  
  - Title: *Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Re...* (truncated).  
  - Source: *anibd.app* (small text below title).  
  - Share icon, menu (three dots), cast icon (right).  
- **Active source chip**: *SUB BEEP* (green, left of player controls).  
- **Player controls**:  
  - *AUTO* chip (gray, next to *SUB BEEP*).  
  - Fullscreen icon, settings (right).  
- **Video player area**: Green loading spinner (center).  
- **Timeline**: *00:00* (left), progress bar, *00:00* (right).  
- **Playback controls**: Lock, volume, rewind, pause, forward, download, *FIT*, fullscreen (bottom row).  
- **Episode info**:  
  - *Episode 1 · Episode 1* (top).  
  - Title: *Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Re...* (truncated).  
  - *BEEP* chip (green, right).  
  - Description: *A 34-year-old Japanese NEET...* (truncated).  
  - Genres: *ADVENTURE, DRAMA, FANTASY* (tags).  
  - Rating: *R-17* (red badge).  


### 3. DESIGN MATCH  
- **Dark premium theme**: Black background, emerald-green accents (*SUB BEEP*, *BEEP* chips) ✔️.  
- **Mobile-first portrait layout**: Video at top, content (episode info) below ✔️.  
- **Top bar active source chip**: *SUB BEEP* visible ✔️.  
- **Video player visible**: Loading spinner (placeholder) present ✔️.  


### 4. VISUAL ISSUES  
- **Title truncation**: *Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Re...* (top bar and episode info) is cut off.  
- **Loading state**: Video player shows a spinner (expected for loading, but no poster visible).  
- **No console errors**: None visible on screen.  
- **Spacing**: Controls and text are properly spaced; no overlapping elements.
